name: Suspicious File Submission
description: Employee submits a file they want the security team to analyze before opening or sharing it.
title: Submit a Suspicious File for Analysis
intro: Thanks for flagging this. If something feels off about a file you downloaded, received, or found, send it to us here and we'll take a look. **Please do not open or run the file** while you're waiting to hear back.
submit_message: Got it. Your submission is in our queue and we'll follow up by email. In the meantime, please don't open the file.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: We'll follow up here with what we find.

fields.label: The suspicious file
fields.help: Upload the file itself if it's safe to do so. If the file is very large or you're not sure, skip this and describe it below.

fields.label: What is the file called?
fields.help: Original filename, including extension if you can see it.

fields.label: Where did this file come from?
What made it seem suspicious?
fields.help: A sentence or two is fine. Was it unexpected? Did the sender seem off? Did your browser warn you?
fields.placeholder: Tell us what caught your eye.
fields.sample_value: Downloaded from an email link that claimed to be from our vendor invoice portal, but the sender's address didn't match the real vendor and the file extension looked weird.

fields.label: Did you already open or run the file?
Which device is the file on?
fields.help: Hostname or asset tag if you know it. Otherwise, a quick description (e.g. 'my work laptop').

alert_template.title: Suspicious file submitted by {{reporter_email}}: {{file_description}}
